title: Sign in with email/password to reach dashboard
description: Verifies an existing user can sign in with email/password and is redirected to the documentation dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to the sign-in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Successful generation completes and opens generated documentation
description: Verifies the generation status view updates to a success terminal state and allows navigating to the generated documentation viewer.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the control to start creating a new documentation project
Complete the wizard with a valid name, type, one HTTPS repository, and a selected branch
Submit the wizard to start generation
Wait for the generation status to reach a success state
Open the generated documentation from the success state
Verify a documentation page viewer is displayed with page content and navigation

title: View a documentation page with navigation and rendered content
description: Verifies a public reader can open a published documentation page and see the sidebar navigation and rendered page content with expected rich rendering.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call-to-action link to view a sample or published documentation page
Select a page from the documentation sidebar
Verify the documentation sidebar with a hierarchical list of pages and groups is displayed
Verify the selected documentation page content is rendered and includes rich formatting such as code highlighting and/or diagrams when present

title: View projects grid with status indicators
description: Verifies an authenticated user can load the dashboard and see documentation project cards with status indicators.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to the sign-in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify documentation project cards with status indicators are displayed

title: Create documentation wizard happy path to status page
description: Verifies an authenticated user can complete all steps of the creation wizard and is redirected to the generation status page after submitting.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the control to start creating a new documentation project
Fill a unique documentation name into the name field
Select a documentation type
Add a valid HTTPS repository URL
Select a branch for the repository
Fill optional custom AI instructions into the instructions field
Submit the wizard to create the documentation
Verify the generation status view for the new documentation is displayed

title: Start sign-up from landing CTA and reach documentation creation wizard
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the landing page through the auth page and, after successful sign-up, reach the dashboard empty state and start the new documentation wizard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call-to-action to start using the product
On the auth page, switch to the sign-up form
Fill a whitelisted-domain email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the sign-up form
Click the empty-state call-to-action to create new documentation
Verify the documentation creation wizard is displayed

title: Sign up with whitelisted domain and valid password
description: Verifies a visitor can create an account using a whitelisted email domain and a valid password and is redirected to the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to the sign-up form
Fill in the email field with a unique whitelisted-domain email address
Fill in the password field with a valid-length password
Submit the sign-up form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Edit documentation metadata and see updates reflected on dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can edit a documentation project's name and description in settings, save, and see the updated metadata reflected back on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open documentation settings for a project from the dashboard
Fill a new documentation name into the name field
Fill a new description into the description field
Save changes
Click the navigation control to return to the dashboard
Verify the dashboard shows the documentation project with the updated name

title: Start new documentation from dashboard empty state
description: Verifies an authenticated user with no projects can use the dashboard empty-state call-to-action to start the creation wizard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to the sign-in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the empty-state action to create a new documentation project
Verify the new documentation wizard is displayed

title: Switch pages from the sidebar hierarchy
description: Verifies a reader can select multiple pages from the sidebar hierarchy and the viewer updates to the chosen page each time.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call-to-action link to view a sample or published documentation page
Select a page from the sidebar near the top of the list
Select a different page from the sidebar farther down the list
Verify the viewer displays the content for the most recently selected page
Verify the sidebar remains visible for continued navigation

title: Toggle visibility from private to public and save
description: Verifies an authenticated user can change a documentation project's visibility to public, save, and see the visibility indicator updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open documentation settings for a project from the dashboard
Toggle visibility from private to public
Save changes
Verify the visibility indicator shows the project is public

title: Cancel generation from status page reaches cancelled terminal state
description: Verifies an authenticated user can cancel a running generation and sees the cancelled terminal state on the status page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the control to start creating a new documentation project
Complete the wizard with a valid name, type, one HTTPS repository, and a selected branch
Submit the wizard to start generation
Wait for the generation status to show it is running
Cancel the generation
Verify the generation status shows a cancelled terminal state

title: Owner sees an Edit action on documentation page after logging in
description: Verifies an authenticated documentation owner can view a documentation page and see an Edit action available in the viewer.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click a documentation project from the dashboard to open its documentation viewer
Verify an Edit action is visible in the documentation viewer for the owner

title: Delete documentation from settings removes it from dashboard list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can delete a documentation project with confirmation and it no longer appears on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the control to start creating a new documentation project
Complete the wizard with a valid name, type, one HTTPS repository, and a selected branch
Submit the wizard to create the documentation
Click the navigation control to return to the dashboard
Open documentation settings for the newly created project from the dashboard
Choose to delete the documentation
Confirm deletion in the app confirmation UI
Click the navigation control to return to the dashboard
Verify the deleted documentation project is no longer listed on the dashboard

title: Navigate sequentially using previous and next links
description: Verifies a reader can move through the documentation sequentially using previous/next navigation and the displayed page updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call-to-action link to view a sample or published documentation page
Click the next page navigation control
Click the previous page navigation control
Verify the documentation viewer updates to show a different page after sequential navigation
Verify the sidebar highlights the currently displayed page

title: Retry a failed generation from dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can trigger a retry for a failed documentation project from the dashboard and the project shows an in-progress state.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to the sign-in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the refresh or retry action on a documentation project that is marked as failed
Verify the project status updates away from failed to an in-progress state

title: Regenerate after failure with updated instructions returns to running state
description: Verifies a failed generation can be regenerated by providing updated instructions and the status transitions back to pending or running.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to the dashboard documentation card that is in a failed generation state
Open the generation status view for that documentation
Choose to regenerate
Fill updated custom AI instructions into the regenerate instructions field
Confirm starting regeneration
Verify the generation status indicates the documentation is pending or running

title: Owner can navigate from docs viewer to edit settings
description: Verifies an authenticated owner can use the Edit action in the documentation viewer to reach the documentation settings/edit experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click a documentation project from the dashboard to open its documentation viewer
Click the Edit action
Verify the documentation settings or editing interface is displayed for the selected documentation

title: Create documentation with multiple repositories and branch selection per repo
description: Verifies an authenticated user can add multiple HTTPS repositories, select a branch for each, and submit successfully to reach the generation status page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the control to start creating a new documentation project
Fill a unique documentation name into the name field
Select a documentation type
Add a valid HTTPS repository URL
Add a second valid HTTPS repository URL
Select a branch for the first repository
Select a branch for the second repository
Submit the wizard to create the documentation
Verify the generation status view for the new documentation is displayed

title: Update repositories and branches in documentation settings
description: Verifies an authenticated user can add or remove repository URLs, select branches for repositories, and save the updated repository configuration.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open documentation settings for a project from the dashboard
Add a valid HTTPS repository URL in the repositories section
Select a branch for the newly added repository
Remove one existing repository from the list
Save changes
Verify the repositories section shows the updated repository list

title: Navigate landing content and start authentication
description: Verifies a visitor can view the landing page sections and use the call-to-action to reach the authentication page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the feature cards section
Scroll to the how-it-works section
Click the call-to-action to get started
Verify the authentication page is displayed

title: Wizard blocks submit when documentation name is missing
description: Verifies the wizard requires a documentation name and shows a validation error when attempting to submit without it.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the control to start creating a new documentation project
Leave the documentation name field empty
Select a documentation type
Add a valid HTTPS repository URL
Select a branch for the repository
Attempt to submit the wizard
Verify a name-required validation error is visible

title: Block sign up with non-whitelisted email domain
description: Verifies sign-up is prevented when using an email address from a non-whitelisted domain and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to the sign-up form
Fill in the email field with a non-whitelisted-domain email address
Fill in the password field with a valid-length password
Submit the sign-up form
Verify an email domain validation error is visible

title: Wizard rejects non-HTTPS repository URL
description: Verifies the wizard enforces HTTPS-only repository URLs by showing a validation error and preventing progress with a non-HTTPS URL.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the control to start creating a new documentation project
Fill a unique documentation name into the name field
Select a documentation type
Add a repository URL using a non-HTTPS scheme into the repository URL field
Attempt to proceed to branch selection or submit the wizard
Verify a repository URL validation error indicating HTTPS is required is visible

title: Block sign up with too-short password
description: Verifies sign-up is prevented when the password does not meet minimum length requirements and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to the sign-up form
Fill in the email field with a unique whitelisted-domain email address
Fill in the password field with a too-short password
Submit the sign-up form
Verify a password length validation error is visible

title: Open Ask AI action from a documentation page
description: Verifies a reader can invoke the Ask AI action from a documentation page and is taken to the app’s outbound prompt handoff flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the call-to-action link to view a sample or published documentation page
Click the Ask AI action
Verify an outbound AI handoff UI is shown (such as a platform selection or a prompt preview)
